ocr_findings.description: Decorative 'この章のポイント！' graphic text on the computer monitor illustration is rendered as plain text without visual context; acceptable given it is a decorative element

reviewer_notes: Chapter opener for 第15章 情報セキュリティ. Large chapter heading, intro paragraph, 'ここに注目して読もう！' bullet list, IPA syllabus URL, and subject-area classification table are all faithfully captured. The table structure (分野/大分類 with merged cells for ストラテジ系/マネジメント系/テクノロジ系) is correctly rendered in markdown. 'chapter_title' label confirmed — page's primary purpose is chapter orientation.
